question: Do I need prior gym experience to join CoreFitness?
answer: No, CoreFitness is designed for all fitness levels. Our trainers guide beginners with proper techniques and structured workout plans to help them start safely and confidently.
bullets: Every new member receives a personalized introduction to equipment
Workouts are designed to grow with you, ensuring beginners can start safely

question: What facilities are included with the membership?
answer: All memberships include access to our full range of gym equipment, locker rooms, and group fitness classes. Premium members also enjoy priority booking and a dedicated locker.
bullets: Full access to cardio and strength equipment

question: Can I try the gym before taking a membership?
answer: Yes! We offer a free 7-day trial membership so you can experience everything CoreFitness has to offer before committing.
bullets: No credit card required for the trial
Full access to all facilities during your trial period

question: Are there group workout programs available?
answer: Absolutely. We offer a wide range of group classes including HIIT, yoga, spinning, and strength training — suitable for all fitness levels.
bullets: Over 20 different group classes per week
Suitable for beginners and advanced members alike

question: Is nutrition guidance included in the plans?
answer: Our Premium membership includes access to personalized nutrition guidance from our certified nutritionists to complement your training program.
bullets: Personalized meal plans available for Premium members
Access to our online nutrition resource library
